'''''Tatooni Booka''''' was a shop in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Among their wares were new and used data storage units, recorded [[Music/Legends|music]], and viewplates. It also had an indoor reading area and café.
